emails.subject: ClickPaper approvals (advance notice)
emails.body: Tana, The counterparties below are about to be approved in Credit. It would be great to get your Legal response before you leave for vacation. We can then minimize approvals that go through Mark Taylor next week. Thanks, Camille Forwarded by Camille Gerard/Corp/Enron on 11/17/2000 09:22 AM Walter Guidroz 11/16/2000 05:21 PM
